narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय संघ में पुतिन के सबसे करीबी सहयोगी माने जाने वाले ओरबान ने यूक्रेन की सहायता करने और युद्ध के लिए मॉस्को पर प्रतिबंध लगाने के यूरोपीय संघ के प्रयासों को नियमित रूप से अवरुद्ध, विलंबित या कमजोर किया है.
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes the European Union's diplomatic and support efforts for Ukraine, portraying them as being systematically undermined by a member state (Hungary under Orbán). It frames the EU's actions as ineffective and obstructed, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting Western diplomatic initiatives.

narratives.evidence_quote: सीसीटीवी के अनुसार, ओरबान ने शांति के लिए चीन की पहल की तारीफ करते हुए उसे सकारात्मक और महत्वपूर्ण बताया तथा उसे वैश्विक उथल-पुथल के बीच स्थिरता लाने वाली ताकत करार दिया.
narratives.reasoning: While the praise is directed at China, the context is China's role as a mediator in the Russia-Ukraine war. By praising China's peace initiative and framing it as a stabilizing force, the text indirectly legitimizes the diplomatic framework involving Russia and positions China (and by extension, its diplomatic partner Russia) as a positive actor for peace, which serves to praise the Russian-aligned diplomatic bloc.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हंगरी धीरे-धीरे यूरोप में इकलौता ऐसा देश बनकर उभर रहा है, जो हर किसी से बात कर सकता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents Hungary as a unique and singular actor within Europe, implying that other European nations are unable or unwilling to engage in dialogue with all parties, thereby promoting the idea of a divided EU with conflicting interests and capabilities.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय परिषद के कई शीर्ष अधिकारियों ने पुतिन की बात को खारिज किया था और कहा था कि ओरबान को द्विपक्षीय संबंधों पर चर्चा के अलावा कुछ भी करने का अधिकार प्राप्त नहीं है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discredits Western (EU) diplomatic efforts and unity by highlighting internal disagreement and the limitation of Orbán's mandate, which supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय संघ में पुतिन के सबसे करीबी सहयोगी माने जाने वाले ओरबान
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán is considered Putin's closest ally in the EU, emphasizing Russia's international support and acceptance at a high political level within Europe.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: ओरबान ने कहा, ‘‘दोनों युद्धरत देशों से बात करने वाले देशों की संख्या कम होती जा रही है. हंगरी धीरे-धीरे यूरोप में इकलौता ऐसा देश बनकर उभर रहा है, जो हर किसी से बात कर सकता है.’’
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement positions Hungary (and by implication, its ally Russia) as a unique and indispensable diplomatic channel. It frames Russia as a party that is still open to dialogue and negotiation, which is a positive portrayal supporting the parent narrative of praising Russia, but does not fit any of the more specific subnarrative definitions.
